_meta.description: EN bundle — DEFAULT locale post 2026-05-28 paradigm flip (Daniel CEO directive). Clean fitness English: Workout / Reps / Sets / Body fat (industry-standard vocabulary, cf. Fitbod / Strong / Hevy). All values are user-facing — keep terse and Maria-65-readable (no jargon). Wave C2 (i18n EN-zero-leak): adds antrenor.* / workout.* / preview.* / energy.* / postRpe.* / postSummary.* / progres.* / istoric.* / coach.* / settings.* sub-trees so every screen surfaces clean EN with zero Romanian leak. RO counterpart in ro.json — must mirror this structure verbatim (bundle integrity test enforces parity).

why.title: ❓ Why {exercise}?
why.unavailable: The explanation is temporarily unavailable. The recommendation is still valid.

categorical.progression_up: We're increasing the weight on {exercise} because you've been progressing steadily over the past weeks. The new target is set so we keep the momentum without compromising your form.
categorical.progression_down: We're easing the weight on {exercise} to prioritize technique. Sometimes a small step back is what unlocks the next jump in strength. We're holding the line.
categorical.hold: We're holding the weight on {exercise} today. You're in a great consolidation zone — that makes sure the base is solid before the next bump.
categorical.recovery: We're trimming volume on {exercise} because fatigue signals are present. It's smarter to recover today so you come back fresh next session.

reason.increase: You handled it easily last time, so I'm nudging the weight up.
reason.catchUp: You're handling this easily — climbing toward your real weight.
reason.easeBack: It's been hard a few times, so I'm easing off so you own the movement.
reason.consolidate: You're not fully recovered, so today we hold the same weight.
reason.init: Still getting to know you — this is a starting point, I'll tune it after your first set.
reason.maintain: You're cutting, so we maintain — no need to chase a record now.
reason.onTarget: You're right in the sweet spot — we hold and build the base.
reason.stagnantSet: You've stalled here a few times, so I add a set instead of weight.
reason.technique: Easing down to work on form — one step back for two forward.

reasonMetric.increase: You held it easily last time, so I'm nudging the challenge up.
reasonMetric.catchUp: You're handling this easily — climbing toward your real level.
reasonMetric.easeBack: It's been hard a few times, so I'm easing off so you own the hold.
reasonMetric.consolidate: You're not fully recovered, so today we hold the same target.
reasonMetric.init: Still getting to know you — this is a starting point, I'll tune it after your first hold.
reasonMetric.maintain: You're cutting, so we maintain the target — no need to chase a record now.
reasonMetric.onTarget: You're right in the sweet spot — we hold and build the base.
reasonMetric.stagnantSet: You've stalled here a few times, so I adjust the hold target.
reasonMetric.technique: Easing up today to work on the hold — one step back for two forward.

antrenor.subtitle: Your guide in the gym.
antrenor.errorBanner: Couldn't load coach recommendations. You can start the session anyway.
antrenor.readinessEmpty: Log your first session to wake your readiness.
antrenor.readinessEmptyReturning: Run today's energy check to read your readiness.

aerobic.subtitle: Your aerobic-class companion.

aerobic.dateAriaLabel: Class date (you can pick a past day)
aerobic.kcalUnknown: Add your weight to estimate calories.
aerobic.readinessTiredNote: Take it easy today. We'll keep your nutrition a touch gentler.

coachToday.addSecondToday: Add a second session for today
coachToday.recoveredQuote: {group} has recovered since {when} — let's nail it.
coachToday.fallbackQuote: Today is your day. Show up — your future self will thank you.
coachToday.laggingSignal: {group} undervolume {weeks} wks — focus on it today.

weekMakeup.added: Added a little {groups} today to get your week back in rhythm.
weekMakeup.addedMany: Putting a touch more focus on a few muscle groups today to balance your week.
weekMakeup.behind: We'll build your {groups} back up over the next few days.

clause.deload: This week is lighter on purpose — you're due a deload.
clause.recoveryCut: Lighter on your {group} today — it's still recovering from your last session.
clause.recoveryCutAerobic: Lighter on your {group} today — your recent cardio is still in your legs.
clause.weaknessAmp: Pushing your {group} harder — it's been lagging behind.
clause.imbalanceFix: Adding volume to your {group} to balance you out.

coachCalibration.withCount: Already adapting to you — I get sharper every session.
coachCalibration.noCount: Getting to know you — the plan sharpens with every session.

coachReturn.line_one: Welcome back — I've rebalanced the rest of your week around the missed session. No stress, the plan adapted.
coachReturn.line_other: Welcome back — I've rebalanced the rest of your week around the {n} missed sessions. No stress, the plan adapted.

coachPivot.ariaLabel: Coach suggestion — change the focus of your training
coachPivot.banner: You're close to your strength ceiling on most exercises — from here the weight climbs slower and slower. Want to shift the focus?
coachPivot.confirmMasa: Switch to muscle growth? I'll adjust: a few more reps, more volume, less chasing records.
coachPivot.confirmMentenanta: Switch to maintenance? I'll hold your gains with a lighter, steady load — no record chasing.
coachPivot.whyLine: You're close to your natural ceiling on most of your main exercises, and the weights haven't climbed in a few weeks.

coachRest.title: Active recovery day
coachRest.body: Recovery is when you grow. Walk, stretch, hydrate.
coachRest.overrideCta: Train today — pick the day in the calendar
coachRest.genericLine: Today is a recovery day — your body needs the rest.

adjust.greuWeight: That was hard - dropping to {kg} kg on the next set
adjust.greuReps: That was hard - dropping to {reps} reps on the next set
adjust.usorWeight: That felt easy - moving up to {kg} kg on the next set
adjust.usorReps: That felt easy - moving up to {reps} reps on the next set
adjust.taperReps: Fatigue is building - aiming for {reps} reps on the next set
adjust.overPerformWeight: You beat the target - moving up to {kg} kg on the next set
adjust.overPerformReps: You beat the target - moving up to {reps} reps on the next set
adjust.underWeight: That was too heavy - dropping to {kg} kg on the next set
adjust.underReps: That was too heavy - dropping to {reps} reps on the next set
adjust.potrivitWeight: Noted - staying at {kg} kg on the next set
adjust.egoCap: You jumped up a lot and it got heavy - staying at {kg} kg to build it right
adjust.baselineNote: First session - building your baseline. Recommendations start adapting from your next session.

activeProbe.calibration: Calibration set - give it everything, it helps us read you right.
activeProbe.suggested: Suggested: {kg} kg x {reps} - a single set, optional.

actions.painDesc: Coach reduces intensity or swaps the exercise
actions.skipDesc: Move to the next one, no penalty
actions.finishEarlyDesc: The partial session is saved, you don't lose progress
actions.soundDesc: Vibration + ding at end of rest
actions.cancelDesc: You lose progress from the current session

empty.title: Today is a rest day
empty.body: No workout scheduled today. Use the calendar above if you want to change the plan.

cues.squat: Keep your chest up and back braced, sit down until your thighs reach parallel, knees tracking over your toes. Stop if you feel sharp pain.
cues.frontSquat: Elbows high, chest tall, descend under control with a flat back. Knees track over your toes.
cues.bulgarianSplitSquat: Torso slightly forward, drop straight down through the front leg, front knee stays over the foot.
cues.deadlift: Flat back, bar close to your shins, push the floor away and raise hips and chest together. Stop if you feel sharp pain in your back.
cues.romanianDeadlift: Flat back, push your hips back, lower the bar close to your legs until you feel the stretch in your hamstrings. Stop if you feel sharp pain in your back.
cues.goodMorning: Soft knees, flat back, hinge your hips back with a light, controlled load.
cues.hipThrust: Upper back on the bench, chin tucked, drive through your heels and squeeze your glutes at the top without arching your lower back.
cues.lunge: Step forward, torso upright, lower the back knee toward the floor, drive up through the front heel.
cues.flatBench: Shoulder blades pinched, lower the bar under control to mid-chest, elbows at ~45 degrees. Use a spotter when going heavy.
cues.flatDbPress: Shoulder blades set, lower under control until you feel the stretch, press without slamming your elbows locked.
cues.inclineDbPress: Bench at ~30 degrees, lower under control to your upper chest, press the dumbbells toward the centre.
cues.inclineBench: Bench at ~30 degrees, shoulder blades pinched, lower the bar to your upper chest under control.
cues.pecDeck: Elbows slightly bent and fixed, bring your hands together in front of your chest and squeeze, return under control.
cues.dbShoulderPress: Sit tall, core braced, press the dumbbells straight overhead without arching your lower back.
cues.overheadPress: Brace your core and glutes, press the bar straight overhead past your face, no lower-back arch.
cues.lateralRaises: Slight bend in the elbows, raise out to shoulder height, lead with your elbows not your hands.
cues.lateralRaisesCable: Slight bend in the elbows, raise out to shoulder height under control, no swinging.
cues.rearDeltFly: Hinge forward, slight elbow bend, open your arms out to the sides squeezing your shoulder blades.
cues.rearDeltCable: Stable torso, pull the cables out and back squeezing your shoulder blades, under control.
cues.facePulls: Pull the rope toward your forehead with elbows high and wide, squeeze your shoulder blades at the end.
cues.latPulldown: Chest up, pull the bar to your upper chest by driving your elbows down, avoid leaning back excessively.
cues.pullUp: Hang with shoulder blades engaged, pull until your chin clears the bar, lower under control.
cues.cableRow: Flat back, pull the handle to your stomach by driving your elbows back, squeeze your shoulder blades.
cues.chestSupportedRow: Chest on the pad, row the weight toward you with elbows back, no swinging.
cues.barbellRow: Hinge forward, flat back, row the bar to your lower stomach squeezing your shoulder blades. Stop if you feel sharp pain in your back.
cues.bayesianCurl: Elbow fixed by your side, full stretch behind you, curl under control without moving your shoulder.
cues.inclineDbCurl: Back on the incline bench, arms hanging, curl without letting your elbows drift forward.
cues.hammerCurl: Neutral grip (palms facing each other), elbows fixed, curl under control without swinging.
cues.cableCurl: Elbows fixed at your sides, curl under control and squeeze at the top, lower slowly.
cues.preacherCurl: Arms on the pad, curl all the way up and lower under control without lifting your elbows off.
cues.pushdown: Elbows tucked to your sides, extend your arms fully down and squeeze, return under control.
cues.overheadTriceps: Elbows high and fixed by your head, extend fully overhead, lower behind you under control.
cues.dip: Keep your torso fairly upright for triceps, lower under control to ~90 degrees at the elbows, press up.
cues.legPress: Keep your back and hips flat against the seat, lower under control, do not snap your knees locked at the top.
cues.legExtension: Back supported, extend your knees under control and squeeze your quads, lower slowly.
cues.legCurl: Hips pressed into the pad, curl your knees under control squeezing your hamstrings, return slowly.
cues.calfRaise: Rise onto your toes as high as you can, brief pause at the top, lower under control for a full stretch.

cues.compound: control the descent, keep the tension
cues.isolation: focus on the target muscle, slow movement
cues.back_squat: chest up, knees over your toes, descend under control below parallel
cues.front_squat: elbows high, torso vertical, descend under control
cues.deadlift: neutral back, push through the floor, hips and knees together
cues.romanian_deadlift: hips back, neutral back, feel the hamstrings
cues.bench_press: shoulder blades pinched, elbows at 45 degrees, touch your chest under control
cues.incline_bench_press: shoulder blades pinched, moderate elbows, control the descent
cues.overhead_press: glutes braced, elbows under the bar, press straight up
cues.barbell_row: neutral back, pull with your elbows, touch your stomach
cues.pull_up: shoulder blades engaged, pull with your back NOT your arms
cues.hip_thrust: chin to chest, squeeze your glutes at the top, control the descent
cues.lunge: knee over your toes, torso vertical, control the return
cues.bulgarian_split_squat: back foot raised, descend vertically, control your balance

tdee.loggedNote: Noted - your target sharpens as you log more about yourself.
tdee.logCta: Tap to log what you ate today. If you don't, the coach assumes you hit the target and adjusts from your weight trend.
tdee.aerobicInfo: Today's training: {kcal} kcal burned — you're that much closer to your goal.
tdee.safetyFloorNote: Target limited to the safe minimum — we won't recommend below this. At this rate your goal may not be fully reached by the deadline.
tdee.safetyCapNote: Limited for safety — a sustainable pace.

projection.label: Projection
projection.noTarget: Set a goal to see the projection.

bodyMap.figureAlt: Front-view body figure, muscle groups colored by recovery
bodyMap.figureAltBack: Back-view body figure, muscle groups colored by recovery
bodyMap.empty: No recovery data yet — train to see your map

logWeight.title: Log weight
logWeight.helper: The entry is saved on your device. You'll see the trend in Weight and BF.

weightTimeline.kpiEmpty: No logs in this range yet.
weightTimeline.chartEmpty: No logs yet. The trend appears here after you record weights.

weightLogList.emptyTitle: Your first weigh-in unlocks the trend
weightLogList.emptyBody: Log from the Progress screen and watch the slope plus updated ETA instantly.
weightLogList.distinctNote: Different from the trend chart - this is the raw list.

bmrStrip.emptyHint: Your profile isn't complete yet. The estimate appears once you fill in the data.

projectionStrip.label: Projection
projectionStrip.emptyHint: Log a few days of meals so I can project where you're headed.
projectionStrip.maintain: If you keep this up, you'll stay around {kg} kg.
projectionStrip.projectedLine: If you keep this up, in {weeks} you'll reach
projectionStrip.disclaimer: Estimate at the current pace, not a promise.

goalForecast.offTrack: Not on track for your goal at the current pace.
goalForecast.reached: You're already at your goal weight.
goalForecast.strengthLineCut: {lift}: realistic in a cut, hold ~{kg} kg.

nutritionInline.helperTop: Auto target from the engine. Tap pencil if you want to log manually.
nutritionInline.helperBottom: Auto target engine + manual log optional. The engine calibrates from real data.

obiectiv.heading: Goal

options.autoSub: The coach picks for you and adapts over time

obiectiv.subhealthyWarning: This goal is below a healthy weight (~{minKg} kg minimum at your height). Pick a healthy target.
obiectiv.targetClampedWarning: A {entered} kg goal is dangerous at your height — we raised it to {floor} kg (the safe minimum). Pick a healthy target.
obiectiv.unsafeRateWarning: Unrealistic goal — would need {rate} kg/week ({direction}), safe maximum ~{cap} kg/week. Realistic deadline: {safeDate}.

gating.switchedToAutoLose: You chose to lose weight — you can't bulk or maintain. Switched to Auto (Cut).
gating.switchedToAutoGain: You chose to gain weight — you can't lose fat or maintain. Switched to Auto (Bulk).
gating.switchedToAutoMaintain: You chose to maintain — you can't lose fat or bulk. Switched to Auto.

timeline.unrealistic: Your target needs ~{askedPct}%/week. Realistic is {safeRateLow}-{safeRateHigh}%/week — much of a faster drop is muscle and water, not fat. Adjust to {safeWeeksMin}-{safeWeeksMax} weeks for a safe pace, or {aggressiveWeeksMin}-{aggressiveWeeksMax} weeks if you accept some muscle-loss risk. Your call.
timeline.veryAggressive: Your target needs ~{askedPct}%/week — doable at your body-fat level, but it's an aggressive pace with real muscle-loss risk. A {safeWeeksMin}-{safeWeeksMax}-week plan is safer; {aggressiveWeeksMin}-{aggressiveWeeksMax} weeks is the aggressive end. Your call.

contradiction.recomp: Building muscle and losing fat at the same time is possible for you right now (a recomp) — but only if the cut is slow. Chasing both fast pulls against each other. We'll keep the deficit gentle so the muscle sticks.
contradiction.sequential: Gaining muscle and losing fat fast at once rarely works once you're already lean — the body picks one. Better to do them in sequence: cut to your target first, then a lean bulk. Or keep weight steady and recomp slowly. Your call.

gain.unrealistic: +{gainKg} kg in {askedWeeks} weeks is mostly water and fat at that pace, not muscle — real muscle comes on around {realisticRateKgMo} kg/month. {gainKg} kg of actual muscle takes about {realisticWeeks} weeks. And gaining that much while revealing abs pulls in opposite directions: better to lean-bulk slowly, then cut. Your call.

frequency.beginnerTooMany: {requested} hard days a week is more than your body can recover from yet — that's how injuries and burnout start. {sustainableHard} hard sessions plus a couple of light fillers will build more, faster. We can ramp up as you adapt.

landing.emptyBody: Finish a workout and it'll show up here with all the details.

detail.title: Session detail
detail.legacyFallback: Per-exercise detail unavailable for sessions logged before this update.
detail.deleteConfirmQuestion: Delete this session? This can't be undone.

prWallScreen.title: Personal Records
prWallScreen.description: Reverse-chrono. All personal records you've logged.
prWallScreen.emptyTitle: Your first PR is one session away
prWallScreen.emptyBody: Beat a max and the record shows up here with date + weight.

ratingsStrip.heading: How your sessions felt
ratingsStrip.ariaLabel: How your sessions felt over the last 90 days
ratingsStrip.footerLead: The coach uses your ratings to adjust intensity.
ratingsStrip.emptyHint: Rate your sessions and this fills in over the last 90 days.

alerts.title: Heads up
alerts.muscleOveruse: {group} is logging high volume — consider a lighter day.
alerts.stalling: Progress on {exercise} has stalled — let's mix it up.
alerts.lowAdherence: You've missed a few sessions — let's get back on track.

patterns.stagnationWeeks: Stagnation for {weeks} weeks. Coach is adjusting the intensity.

proactive.proteinDeficit: Average protein over the last {days} days: {avg}g. Target: {target}g. Increase your intake.
proactive.sleepDebt: Readiness below {threshold} for {days} days in a row. Prioritize sleep.
proactive.prOpportunity: Readiness at {score} — a good day for a PR. You haven't set a PR in 14 days.
proactive.trainingStreak: {streak} days of training in a row! Keep the rhythm going.
proactive.kcalTooLow: Average kcal over the last {days} days: {avg}. Below {target} kcal — risk of muscle loss.
proactive.pastPeakHours: You've passed your peak hours ({start}:00-{end}:00). Train anyway — every session counts.
proactive.weightIncreasingInCut: Weight went up by {delta}kg during a CUT. Check your calories.
proactive.inactivity: You haven't trained for {days} days. Start back with an easy session.
proactive.lowHydration: Hydration today: {ml}ml. Target: {target}ml. Drink water before training.

reactivate.title: Welcome back
reactivate.body: We haven't talked in {days} days. No pressure - we'll ease back in with an adjusted session.

resumeSession.title: Resume session
resumeSession.body: You paused {when}. Continue where you left off?

day7.title: Training schedule
day7.editHint: Toggle the days you can train this week.

dayPreview.title: {day} - {kind}
dayPreview.ariaLabel: Workout preview for the selected day
dayPreview.restBody: Rest day. The coach proposes no workout today - recovery is part of the plan.
dayPreview.emptyBody: The coach can't propose a workout for this day yet. The schedule is computed from your current state - come back after logging a few more sessions.
dayPreview.liveNote: The list is recomputed from your current state (recovery, progress) every time you open it.
dayPreview.missed: You didn't train on this day.

exitConfirm.title: Leave the session?
exitConfirm.body: What do you want to do with the progress so far?

exitSheet.title: Leave the session?

reasons.weight_spike: The weight jumped a lot vs your recent sets.
reasons.rate_spike: You're loading faster than your usual pace.

painButton.heading: Where does it hurt?
painButton.subtitle: Coach avoids exercises that aggravate the area.
painButton.medicalCue: If none fits, stop the session and consult a doctor.
painButton.reassureToast: Safety comes first. We've adjusted the rest of the session.
painButton.clearPinCta: No longer hurts - bring this exercise back

setLog.addedWeightHint: Belt / dumbbell. Leave 0 for pure bodyweight.

perSetSafety.title: Hold up
perSetSafety.body: You picked up the pace beyond usual. Check your form and recover before the next set.

anomalyGuard.title: Is this right?
anomalyGuard.weight: You entered {value} kg. That looks high vs what you've done so far (~{plausible} kg). Sure?
anomalyGuard.reps: You entered {value} reps. That looks high. Sure?
anomalyGuard.quarantineNote: We didn't learn from a set that looked far above your usual ({value} kg) - it's still in your log.
anomalyGuard.quarantineRevertCta: That was real - learn from it
anomalyGuard.quarantineRevertToast: Got it - learning from that set.

inactivity.title: Still there?
inactivity.body: We haven't seen activity for a while. Want to continue or save and exit?

aparatLipsa.introPost: . The coach picks alternatives and won't suggest them again.
aparatLipsa.intro2: You can come back any time to remove items from the list if you get the equipment.
aparatLipsa.learnNote: The coach learns from your choices. If several machines are missing, it suggests bodyweight sessions or alternatives.
aparatLipsa.exercisesIntro: Equipment you marked missing during a workout. The coach won't suggest these. Remove one if you get the equipment back.

energyCause.body: Pick one. The coach uses your answer to adapt the session.

cevaNuMerge.body: Tell me what's up and I'll adjust the session.

equipmentSwap.heading: Machines busy?
equipmentSwap.body: Mark what's busy. I'll show you what to do instead.

energy.title: Tell Andura how you feel
energy.body: Tap here before training. It tunes today's weights to your energy.

start.title: Ready? Start the session
start.body: Andura has your workout ready. It guides you exercise by exercise.

log.title: Log what you did
log.body: Andura suggests the weight. Change it with +/- if it was different, then confirm the set.

rate.title: How did the set feel?
rate.body: From Easy / Right / Hard, Andura adjusts your next set on its own. Be honest.

done.title: That's it!
done.body: You'll find the rest on your own. Your progress and history live in the other tabs.

avatar.hint: Saved on this account. No upload, no photo.

announcements.title: What's new
announcements.intro: Official announcements and patch notes from the Andura team.
announcements.emptyBody: Updates and patch notes will show up here. Check back soon.

error.title: Couldn't load announcements
error.body: Check your connection and try again.

units.heading: Units
units.note: Kilograms only for now. Pounds will be available post-Beta.

advanced.heading: Advanced
advanced.debugLogDesc: Record taps for bug reports (applies on next launch)
advanced.debugLogCopyDesc: Copy the LAST workout as JSON (no navigation taps)
advanced.collectDesc: Keep your training interactions on this device to improve your coaching. Never leaves your device.

profile.title: Profile and targets
profile.name: Name
profile.focusHint: Pick the look you're after. I shape your week and volume around it. Leave it on Balanced and I'll decide for you.
profile.focusBalancedDesc: I decide what to prioritize. The default.
profile.focusVTaperDesc: Wider shoulders and back. Less leg work.
profile.focusUpperDesc: More chest, back and shoulders. Less leg work.
profile.focusDeEmphNote: You're minimizing some muscles. Your call. I'll keep them at maintenance, not zero.
profile.bfHint: Fill in neck, waist and height for a US Navy estimate. Until then we show a demographic estimate.
profile.bfRangeError: Value is outside the 3-60% range. It won't be saved until you fix it.
profile.bodyMeasureNeckWaist: Neck must be smaller than waist. It looks like these two values were swapped.
profile.bodyMeasureRange: Check your measurements: neck 25-60 cm, waist 50-200 cm, hip 50-200 cm.
profile.bodyCompFooter: Calculated automatically (US Navy: waist + neck + height + sex) or set by you. Falls back to a demographic estimate when measurements are missing.
profile.skinfoldHint: Optional. With a caliper (mm) we use the Jackson-Pollock 3-site method, more accurate than tape. Leave it off if you don't have one.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Pick when Andura should ping you.
notifications.remindersBody: Daily nudge based on your training plan.
notifications.prBody: Get notified when you hit a new personal record.
notifications.intro: Pick the nudges you want. Nothing intrusive.
notifications.permissionDenied: Your browser is blocking notifications. Open the site settings (the padlock next to the URL) and allow them.
notifications.permissionNoAccount: Notifications need an account so the coach can send reminders. Sign in to enable them.
notifications.permissionUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support push notifications.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.dataBody: Your training data lives on your device. We sync only what you choose to back up.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: We use Firebase for auth and storage. No ads, no analytics tracking.
privacy.headerSubtitle: Your data stays on your phone. You decide what leaves.
privacy.exportToggleDesc: I can download my data anytime from the Download data screen.
privacy.telemetryToggleDesc: Automatically send crash reports so we can fix issues. On by default - turn it off anytime.
privacy.footerNote: We use Sentry only for crash reports, on by default - turn it off above anytime. Personal data (email, identifiers) is stripped before sending. We don't collect usage metrics.

policy.title: Privacy policy
collectItems: Onboarding profile: age, sex, goal, frequency, experience, weight (Big 6)
Training sessions: exercises, sets, kg, reps, duration, RPE
Optional biometric inputs: body weight, measurements (waist, arms, legs)
Email for the Magic Link (optional passwordless sign-in)
useItems: Personalizing workouts (volume, intensity, frequency based on Big 6)
Recommendation engine (readiness, fatigue, PR detection - on your phone)
Optional Firebase RTDB backup (encrypted in transit over HTTPS) only if you're signed in
ZERO ads, ZERO data sales, ZERO third-party trackers
rightsItems: Access + portability: export all your data as JSON from Account > Download data
Erasure: clear everything from Account > Logout and delete > Delete account
Rectification: edit your profile directly in Account > Profile
Objection: crash reporting toggle above (on by default, turn it off anytime)
Restricted processing: disable the Firebase backup (sign out)
policy.storageBody: Data is stored locally on your device (localStorage + IndexedDB). The optional Firebase RTDB backup keeps a copy until you delete the account. ZERO copies on third-party servers. Device deletion is immediate. Firebase RTDB data (if you're signed in) is wiped automatically on "Delete account" (best-effort GDPR Art. 17, server propagation <5 min). Problems with remote deletion? Write to {email} (reply <72h).
policy.sensitiveBody: Andura is a fitness app, NOT a medical device. Body weight, measurements, or pain reported via the Pain Button are strictly sporting data, NOT medical. We don't collect diagnoses, treatments, prescriptions, or other GDPR Art. 9 special categories. If you have medical conditions, see your doctor first (see Medical disclaimer in Terms of service).
policy.subprocessorsBody: To run the service we use two sub-processors: Google Firebase (auth + RTDB backup, EU europe-west1 region) and Sentry (app error reporting, on by default with an opt-out, personal data stripped). ZERO third-party analytics, ZERO advertising, ZERO data brokers.
policy.contactBody: For GDPR questions or complaints: {email}. You also have the right to file a complaint with your national data protection authority.
policy.version: Beta version - updated 2026-05-22. Data controller: Andura PWA, solo developer Daniel. Data stored in the EU (Firebase europe-west1).

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: By using Andura, you agree to these terms.
terms.medicalBody: Andura is not a substitute for medical advice. Consult a doctor before starting a new training program.
terms.tcIntro: Andura is a local-first personal training coach. All data is stored on your phone and can be exported or deleted anytime from the Account screen.
terms.tcAcceptIntro: By using Andura you agree to these key points:
tcItems: Andura offers recommendations, NOT medical prescriptions.
You're responsible for your own safety in the gym.
The Firebase backup is optional (Magic Link sign-in) and encrypts data in transit (HTTPS).
Crash reporting is on by default with an opt-out, with personal data stripped before sending.
Andura is in free Beta. Features may change or be added without notice until V1 launch.
terms.tcVersion: Beta version - updated 2026-05-18. Full text available online at
terms.medicalIntro: Andura is a fitness app, NOT a medical device or a substitute for advice from a doctor, physiotherapist, or professional coach.
terms.medicalConsultIntro: See a doctor before starting any new training program, especially if you:
medicalItems: Have a medical condition (cardiac, respiratory, musculoskeletal).
Have persistent pain or recent injuries.
Take medication that affects physical effort.
terms.medicalListenBody: In the gym, listen to your body. If you feel sharp pain, dizziness, or breathing problems - stop the session and ask for help.
terms.medicalAccepted: Accepted at onboarding. You can read this text anytime.

export.title: Download your data
export.body: Get a JSON file with everything you've logged.
export.intro: Take all your Andura data in a single JSON file you can store locally or move to another device. Includes profile + workouts + aerobic classes + nutrition + settings + calendar.
contentItems: Profile and Big 6 (age, sex, goal, frequency, experience, weight)

import.title: Import history
import.body: Upload a JSON file with weight + nutrition entries to backfill.
import.intro: Already have a weight and calorie history from another app? You can import it from a CSV file. The coach uses the history to calibrate your calorie target much faster.
whatItems: You can select both CSV files at once
import.noDataError: Couldn't find any data to import in the file. Check that it's a CSV export with a Date column plus calories or weight.

skip.noDataColumn: No calories or weight column found

import.doneMessage: Done. Imported {weightN} weight days and {nutritionN} nutrition days. The coach is already using the data for calibration.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.freeBetaBody: Andura is free for all Beta users. Pricing will be announced post-launch.
subscription.comingSoonBody: We're working on clear subscription plans. Until then, everything is free for Beta users.
subscription.notifiedCta: We'll let you know when it's ready

support.title: Support
support.body: Need help? Reach us at support@andura.app.
support.intro: I reply personally, usually within 24 working hours.
support.messageHint: Bug, idea, feedback - write freely. It comes straight to us.

about.title: About Andura
about.body: Andura is a Romanian-built fitness coach. Solo bootstrap, plan x20, two-to-three-year horizon.
about.tagline: Train with intention. Built in Romania.
about.intro: Andura helps you train with intent - not more, but better. The coach learns from your feedback and adapts every session.
about.thanks: With thanks to all the beta testers who helped polish the app.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.header: Short answers to the questions we get most often.
faq.footerHint: Can't find an answer? Write to us from

items.trainingChangeProgram: How do I change my program?
items.trainingChangeProgramA: Go to Coach > tap the pencil on the Week card > pick training and rest days > Save. The coach recalibrates automatically.
items.trainingSkipSessionA: Yes. Tap the X during the session > Skip session. The coach doesn't penalize you and adjusts weekly recommendations based on your real adherence.
items.trainingProgressA: The coach uses logged sets (kg + reps + RPE) + body weight + readiness score. Pattern recognition runs on your phone, no mandatory cloud upload.
items.accountPassword: How do I recover my password?
items.accountPasswordA: Andura uses Magic Link (no password). On the Sign-in screen enter your email > you'll get a unique link in your inbox > tap it on the same phone.
items.accountMultiPhone: Can I use it on multiple phones?
items.accountMultiPhoneA: Yes, if you're signed in with an account (Magic Link or Google). Automatic backup in Firebase europe-west1 (EU). Test-drive mode (no account) stays Tier 0 local on the current phone.
items.accountDataLocationA: Local-first on your phone (localStorage Tier 0 + IndexedDB Tier 1). Optional Firebase RTDB backup, encrypted in transit. We don't collect usage metrics; crash reporting is on by default (you can opt out anytime in Settings) with personal data stripped.
items.notificationsMissing: Why am I not getting notifications?
items.notificationsMissingA: Check Account > Notifications > toggle on + days selected + reminder time. PWA notifications need a browser/OS permission - accept the initial prompt. If you refused, reset it from your phone settings.

danger.title: Logout and delete
danger.logoutBody: Sign out on this device. Your data stays.
danger.resetBody: Erase local training data on this device. Cloud backup unchanged.
danger.deleteBody: Permanently delete your account and all data. This can't be undone.
danger.warningBanner: The actions below affect your account. Read the confirmation page carefully before running them.
danger.logoutRowSub: Your data stays on the phone.
danger.resetRowSub: Erase everything on this phone. Account kept.
danger.gdprFooter: GDPR Art. 17: on "Delete account," local data + the Firebase RTDB backup are erased automatically (best-effort, server propagation <5 min).

confirms.logoutBody: You'll need to sign in again.
confirms.deleteBody: All your data will be permanently deleted. Type DELETE to confirm.
confirms.resetBody: Local training data will be erased on this device.
confirms.resetCoachBody: The AI will restart learning from scratch.
confirms.redoOnboardingBody: You'll go through the initial setup again.

logout.title: Sign out
logout.heading: Sign out?
logout.body1: Your logged workouts and records are saved to your account, not to this phone. They come back next time you sign in with the same email.
logout.body2: For your safety on a shared device, the history, the weight chart, and your streak are cleared from this phone on sign-out, until you sign back in.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.heading: Heads up
deleteAccount.body1: Your data on this device is erased right away and you are signed out.
deleteAccount.body2: Your cloud backup is kept for 30 days. Sign back in within 30 days to restore your account, or it is permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.errorRetry: We could not reach the server to delete your account. Check your connection and try again.

restoreAccount.title: Account scheduled for deletion
restoreAccount.heading: Welcome back
restoreAccount.body: You asked to delete this account. Your data is still here. Restore it now, or delete it for good.
restoreAccount.bodyExpired: The 30-day restore window for this account has passed, so it can only be deleted now.

resetData.title: Reset data
resetData.heading: Reset all data?
resetData.body1: All workouts, ratings, and local measurements will be erased.
resetData.body2: Your account stays active. This action cannot be undone.
resetData.cloudFailed: Your local data was cleared. We could not delete the cloud copy (check your connection). Try again for a full reset.

redoOnboarding.title: Redo onboarding
redoOnboarding.heading: Heads up
redoOnboarding.body1: You'll redo the initial setup - goals, experience level, availability.
redoOnboarding.body2: Your current profile is kept, but old answers will be overwritten. Reversible if you finish onboarding again.

resetCoach.title: Reset coach
resetCoach.heading: Heads up
resetCoach.body1: This will erase the AI progress learned about you and restart the coach from scratch.
resetCoach.body2: Your training data stays intact. Irreversible.

schimbaFaza.title: Switch phase manually
schimbaFaza.heading: Heads up
schimbaFaza.body1: Switching the active phase manually? This will reset some calibrations. Continue?
schimbaFaza.body2: The coach will recalibrate TDEE, volume, and progression based on the new phase. Historical data stays intact.

options.autoHintWithNow: Coach decides based on progress - now: {label} (recommended)

finishEarly.title: Finish early
finishEarly.heading: Finish the session now?
finishEarly.body1: The partial session is saved. The coach uses what you've logged so far - you don't lose progress.
finishEarly.body2: The recorded sets stay in the history. The coach adjusts the week based on what you did.

programChange.title: Change program
programChange.heading: Change program?
programChange.body1Prefix: The coach will regenerate the week as
programChange.body2: Completed sessions stay in the history.

insufficient.label: Not enough data
insufficient.detail: Log 2+ sessions to see your fatigue score

HIGH_FATIGUE.label: We'll go lighter today
HIGH_FATIGUE.detail: There've been a few heavy sessions recently. Volume is set more conservatively for a full recovery.

MODERATE_FATIGUE.label: A bit more conservative
MODERATE_FATIGUE.detail: Today we hold the weights and focus on technique and control.

PEAK_FORM.label: We're in good shape
PEAK_FORM.detail: Recovery is complete. We've got the energy to push the bar today.

NORMAL.label: On track
NORMAL.detail: Healthy rhythm. Let's go with today's plan.

preset: Let's go, you've got the rhythm.
Same tempo as last time - you're locked in.
This set is going well - one deep breath before you start.
Hold the form, the rest follows.
postUsor: Too easy - we'll add a touch on the next one.
If you have more in the tank, push 1-2 extra reps on the next set.
Nice - the coach raises the bar a bit.
postPotrivit: That's what we want - you're right on track.
Good, you're moving well. Same approach.
Just right - solid prediction. Keep it up.
postGreu: OK, we'll pull back a notch on the next one.
Hard set - we hold the same weight, no pushing.
Noted. The coach adjusts on its own.
rest: Sip some water, drop the shoulders.
That set was solid - same effort on the next.
transition: One down. On to the next!
Nice - first one in the bag.
That's it. One more exercise and you're halfway.
endSessionUsor: Moving well - see you Thursday with more pep.
Clean session. Tomorrow we go up a notch.
endSessionGreu: Moving well - it was a hard one today, tomorrow we recover.
Noted. You gave it all - that's what matters.
reflectie: Today's session moved you closer to your monthly target - keep going.
12 days in a row. Consistency beats intensity.
Good rhythm. Tomorrow rest, Thursday we come back.
preview: We know what's on for today - let's do it clean.
Listen to your body; we'll adjust on the fly if anything comes up.

splash.trustFooter: Made in Romania · Your data stays yours

tdeeStrip.healthyFloorMsg: You're below a healthy weight — let's grow gradually and healthily. Today's target has a small surplus, not a deficit. If you're losing weight unintentionally, it's worth a word with a doctor.

medicalDisclaimer.title: Before we begin
medicalDisclaimer.p1: Andura is an AI coach. The recommendations are informational, not a substitute for medical advice.
medicalDisclaimer.p2: If you have medical conditions, recent injuries or persistent pain, consult your doctor before starting a training program.
medicalDisclaimer.p3: At any sharp pain or abnormal sensation, stop immediately and check with a specialist.
medicalDisclaimer.p4: By continuing you confirm that you have read this information.

legalPage.privacyIntro: Your data stays on your phone. You control what leaves it. Andura is local-first: your profile and sessions are saved on your device. This policy explains what we collect, why, and the rights you have under the EU GDPR.
legalPage.privacyControllerBody: Andura is operated by its solo founder in Romania (EU). For any privacy matter, including to exercise your rights, contact the data controller by email.
legalPage.privacyCollectBody: We collect only what the app needs to coach you: your profile (age, sex, weight, height, training goal, frequency and experience), your workout logs, weight and nutrition logs, body measurements, and the email address used for the magic link sign-in. We use this data to personalize your training and nutrition, on your device. We do not collect usage analytics.
legalPage.privacyBasisBody: We process your account email to provide the sign-in you asked for (contract / your request). We process your training, weight, nutrition and body data to deliver the coaching feature you use, on the basis of your consent, which you give by entering it and can withdraw anytime by deleting the data. Optional cloud backup runs only on your separate consent. Crash reporting is on by default (you can turn it off anytime in Settings), with personal data stripped before sending. Health-related data (weight, body measurements) is special-category data under Art. 9 and is processed solely on your explicit consent.
legalPage.privacyStorageBody: By default your data lives only on your device, in the browser's IndexedDB and local storage. If you sign in and enable cloud backup, a copy is synced to Google Firebase (Realtime Database) under a private path tied to your account, so you can restore it on another device. If you use Andura without an account (guest mode), your data never leaves your device.
legalPage.privacyProcessorsHeading: Who else processes data (processors and transfers)
legalPage.privacyProcessorsBody: We use Google Firebase (authentication, email delivery for the magic link, and optional cloud backup) and Sentry for crash reporting (on by default, with an opt-out in Settings; personal data is stripped before sending). These providers act as our processors. Google may process data on servers outside the EU; such transfers are covered by Standard Contractual Clauses. We never sell or share your data with advertisers.
legalPage.privacyRetentionBody: Local data stays until you delete it from your device. Cloud backup stays until you delete your data or your account. When you ask to delete your account, it is disabled immediately and permanently erased after a 30-day grace period in case you change your mind.
legalPage.privacyNotDoBody: ZERO advertising. ZERO data sales. ZERO third-party trackers. We don't use your data for ads.
legalPage.privacyCookiesBody: Andura does not use advertising or tracking cookies. We use the browser's local storage and IndexedDB only to keep the app working: your session, your settings and your data on the device.
legalPage.privacyChildrenBody: Andura is for adults only. You must be at least 18 years old to use it. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18.
legalPage.privacySecurityBody: Sign-in uses a passwordless magic link, not a stored password. Data in transit is encrypted over HTTPS. Cloud backup is reachable only with your authenticated account token.
legalPage.privacyRightsBody: You have the right to access, rectify, export (data portability), and erase your data, to withdraw consent, and to object to or restrict processing. You can exercise most of these directly in the app: export your data as JSON and delete your account and data from the Account screen, anytime. For anything else, email us. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Romanian supervisory authority, ANSPDCP (dataprotection.ro).
legalPage.privacyChangesBody: We may update this policy as Andura evolves. The date at the top shows the current version. Material changes will be highlighted in the app.
legalPage.privacyContactBody: For privacy questions or to exercise your rights, write to
legalPage.termsIntro: Andura is a local-first personal training coach. All data is stored on your phone and can be exported or deleted anytime from the Account screen. By using Andura you accept the following key points:
legalPage.termsEligibilityBody: You must be at least 18 years old to use Andura. By using the app you confirm that you are an adult.
legalPage.termsServiceBody: Andura is an AI fitness coach that suggests workouts and nutrition guidance. It is informational only and is provided for general fitness purposes.
legalPage.termsRecsBody: Andura provides training recommendations, NOT medical prescriptions. It is not a medical device or a substitute for the advice of a doctor, physiotherapist or professional trainer.
legalPage.termsResponsibilityBody: You are responsible for your own safety at the gym. Consult a doctor before starting any new training program. If you feel sharp pain, dizziness or breathing difficulty, stop the session.
legalPage.termsBackupBody: Firebase backup is optional (magic-link authentication, no password) and encrypts data in transit over HTTPS.
legalPage.termsErrorsBody: Error reporting (crashes) is on by default with an opt-out and uses Sentry, with personal data stripped before sending. We don't collect usage metrics. You can turn it on or off anytime.
legalPage.termsBetaBody: Andura is in free Beta. Features may be changed or added without prior notice until the V1 launch.
legalPage.termsWarrantyBody: Andura is provided free, as is and as available, with no warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee that it is error-free, always available, or fit for a particular result.
legalPage.termsLiabilityBody: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any injury, loss or damage arising from your use of Andura. You train at your own risk. Nothing here limits liability that cannot be excluded by law.
legalPage.termsIpBody: Andura, its content and software belong to its founder. Your own training data belongs to you. You may use the app for your personal, non-commercial fitness only.
legalPage.termsTerminationBody: You can delete your account and data anytime from the Account screen. We may suspend or end access if the service is misused or to comply with the law.
legalPage.termsLawBody: These terms are governed by the law of Romania (EU). Disputes are subject to the competent courts of Romania, without prejudice to mandatory consumer-protection rights.
legalPage.termsChangesBody: We may update these terms as Andura evolves. The date at the top shows the current version. Continued use after a change means you accept the updated terms.

exerciseLibrary.title: Exercise library
exerciseLibrary.groupsIntro: Pick a muscle group to see its exercises.

preferences.refusalDesc: Pick any you never want in your plan. Andura swaps in a safe same-muscle alternative. Optional.
preferences.equipmentDesc: Pick only what you have. Andura builds your plan from these. Leave empty for a full gym.
